_instructions: Funnel stage configuration. Defines content targets per stage and per platform.

TOFU._description: Top of funnel — awareness. They don't know you yet.

MOFU._description: Middle of funnel — consideration. They know you, building trust.

BOFU._description: Bottom of funnel — decision. They're ready to act.

rebalance_rules.TOFU_deficit: If TOFU < 35%, prioritize trending angle content this week
rebalance_rules.BOFU_heavy: If BOFU > 30%, reduce direct CTAs — audience needs more warmup
rebalance_rules.MOFU_deficit: If MOFU < 25%, add one how-to or case study piece

new_product_default: For products under 3 months old: 60% TOFU, 30% MOFU, 10% BOFU
